_doc: === SOURCE: A registered information source with trust and bias metadata ===
name: Harbor Security Logs
_source_type: REQUIRED. One of: NewsOutlet, GovernmentAgency, AcademicInstitution, SocialMedia, Sensor, StructuredApi, HumanAnalyst, OsintTool, or Custom(string).
description: CCTV and access logs from the harbor district security system
_trust_score: REQUIRED. Float 0.0-1.0. Overall reliability of this source.
_track_record: Cumulative accuracy stats. suggested_trust = corroborated / made.
ingestion_notes: Logs obtained via formal request to port authority
